headline: Close the gap — 0.1 kg/week shortfall starts today.
summary: You're 49 days behind pace; today's discipline on food and a real workout are non-negotiable steps toward 88 kg by June 2027.
details: Eat only pre-portioned Huel meals today — no snacking, no extras, target under 7,500 kJ total. Get on the rowing machine for 45 minutes or the treadmill for 60 minutes; don't skip it because it's Thursday and the weekend slide is coming. Every day you hit your targets now buys you buffer against the Friday–Sunday pattern that's keeping you 49 days behind.
